parsed_review.summary: CP00-724 is a descriptor-only RP24 Korean Legal Depth pack (40 units, RP24.P01.M04.S07-RP24.P01.M06.S04) that does not claim production_ready, runtime_ready, or enterprise trust (all false). Read-only inspection of registry.js, service.js, validators.js, index.js, test/model.test.js, the generated contract, the validator script, README, and the cp00-724 evidence set confirms the no-write/no-real-data/runtime-closed boundary is both declared (KOREAN_LEGAL_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION plus per-row descriptor_only flags) and enforced (validateDescriptor rejects runtime opening, sensitive/legal/credential payloads, cross-tenant access, permission-decision and audit-body exposure, and any Claude-final-approval or enterprise-trust claim), with unit tests asserting these invariants for CP722/723/724. Deliverable distribution (implementation 22, ui 6, fixture 2, test 6, hermes_evidence 2, claude_review 2 = 40) and micro-title distribution (Secondary Workflow Slice 14, Permission And Audit Binding 22, Synthetic Fixture Set 4) match the manifest plan_binding_snapshot and CP724 requirements exactly; the generated korean-legal-depth contract reports validation.valid=true with no error entries and latest_projection KoreanLegalCp724WorkflowPermissionFixtureBridgeDescriptor while preserving CP722/CP723 as historical. Hermes patterns are deterministic packet/receipt only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, receipt_shape descriptor_only_korean_legal_no_write; hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false); Claude is preserved as read-only, non-final reviewer (claude_is_final_approver=false). Command-evidence records the full validation ladder green (all exit_code 0); these were inspected, not independently re-executed, consistent with the read-only review model. The pack is correctly in pending_review state with empty valid/invalid review receipts and no pre-existing raw-output/receipt; the readiness auth-preflight passed with well-formed JSON, so review evidence is valid (no auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed or fenced JSON, missing fields, or tool-call-shaped output). Unrelated dirty/untracked files were excluded per changed-file-scope. No P0-P3 issues found; this review constitutes the single pack-level read-only Claude review and does not by itself confer final human or enterprise-trust approval.
